empty.title: No program selected
empty.subtitle: Create and select a program to start adding workouts.

programs.title: Programs
programs.s0_text: Programs are collections of workouts. Create one for each training split (e.g. Push/Pull/Legs, Upper/Lower).
programs.s1_text: Tap the radio button on the left to select a program. Its workouts will appear in the Workouts tab.
programs.s2_text: Tap the chevron on the right to expand a program and see all its workouts at a glance.
programs.s3_text: Tap the pencil button at the bottom to add, delete, or rename programs. You can also add notes and set training frequency.

workouts.title: Workouts
workouts.s0_text: Tap any workout card to open it and start filling in your sets.
workouts.s1_text: Tap the chevron to expand a card and see all exercises inside.
workouts.s2_text: The badge on each card shows when you last completed that workout — green for recent, orange for a while ago, red for overdue.
workouts.s3_text: Use the pencil button to add new workouts or delete existing ones.

workout.title: Inside a Workout
workout.s0_text: Tap any cell to enter weight, reps, or RIR. A completed set turns green.
workout.s1_text: Use the view selector to see your last session, fill in the current one, or plan your next.
workout.s2_text: Enter values in the Next view to plan your next session. Those values will show up with a calendar icon during your next workout — confirm or adjust them on the fly.
workout.s3_text: Each exercise has a rest timer. Tap the timer icon at the bottom of an exercise to start the countdown.
workout.s4_text: The target rep range is shown at the bottom of each exercise. Edit it in edit mode.
workout.s5_text: Toggle between kg and lbs with the unit switch at the bottom of each exercise.
workout.s6_text: Tap the pencil to add/remove exercises and sets, rename exercises, and adjust rest timers.

graphs.title: Graphs
graphs.s0_text: Each card shows the total tonnage (weight × reps) trend for a workout over time.
graphs.s1_text: The green/red badge shows your overall progression between your first and most recent session.
graphs.s2_text: Tap a card to see the tonnage breakdown per exercise, with session-by-session trends.

graphDetail.title: Graph Detail
graphDetail.s0_text: The top chart shows your total tonnage progression across all exercises for this workout.
graphDetail.s1_text: Each exercise has its own mini chart showing how your tonnage evolved session by session.
graphDetail.s2_text: The percentage badges here compare each session to the previous one, so you can track your progress over time.

coach.bullet1: Personalized programs generated from your training history
coach.bullet3: Smart analysis of your strengths and weaknesses
coach.bullet4: Adaptive planning based on fatigue and recovery
coach.successMsg: You're on the list! We'll reach out when Coach IA launches.
